CheckServerEvent.action: Action performed on the instance; fixed value for this API: CheckServerEvent
CheckServerEvent.serverEventId: Maintenance event ID; one of serverEventId or instanceId is required
CheckServerEvent.instanceId: Instance ID; one of serverEventId or instanceId is required
CheckServerEvent.checkResult: Whether the unexpected event passes acceptance; Pass or Reject
CheckServerEvent.issueEffect: Impact of the fault; required when checkResult is Reject
CheckServerEvent.issueDescription: Description of the fault impact; required when checkResult is Reject
CheckServerEvent.authorizeMaintenanceOperation: Authorized O&M operation when checkResult is Reject
